data.title: Dasin Retail Trust Ends Key Management Agreements
data.description:
Dasin Retail Trust (SG:CEDU) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Dasin Retail Trust has decided to terminate its commercial and property management agreements for Shiqi Metro Mall, Xiaolan Metro Mall, Ocean Metro Mall, and Dasin E-Colour, effective December 31, 2024. This decision comes amidst concerns over outstanding receivables and potential conflicts of interest with the current management, prompting a strategic shift in their property oversight approach.

data.title: UBA Investments Reassures After Chairman’s Censure
data.description:
UBA Investments Ltd. (HK:0768) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

UBA Investments Ltd. reassures investors after its chairman, Dr. Wong Yun Kuen, faced public censure for rule breaches during his tenure at Kaisun Holdings. The company’s board maintains confidence in Dr. Wong’s integrity, citing his lack of involvement in the operations leading to the breaches and his commitment to undergoing further compliance training. UBA Investments emphasizes that the issues pertain solely to Dr. Wong’s past role at Kaisun and not to UBA itself.

For further insights into HK:0768 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Felix Gold Unveils Promising Results Near Major Mines
data.description:

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Felix Gold Ltd (ASX:FXG) has announced promising results from its auger sampling program at the NE Fairbanks Project, located near two major mines, Kinross Gold’s Fort Knox and Freegold Ventures’ Golden Summit. The program highlighted peak gold values and identified several zones for further investigation, underscoring the strategic importance of the project area, which already boasts a significant mining history. The company remains optimistic about the commercial potential of its gold assets and continues to explore opportunities to enhance its portfolio.

Kunming Dianchi Water Treatment Co., Ltd. is undergoing a significant reshuffle in its shareholding structure as Yuntou Finance Leasing acquires 213 million shares, making Yunnan Investment Group a substantial shareholder with a 27.03% stake. data.title: MoneyHero Limited’s Q3 2024 Performance and Strategy
data.description:
Moneyhero Limited ( (MNY) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Moneyhero Limited presented to its investors.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

MoneyHero Limited is a leading personal finance and digital insurance aggregation platform in Greater Southeast Asia, providing comparison services across various financial products. In the third quarter of 2024, MoneyHero Limited reported a revenue increase of 6% year-over-year to $20.9 million, driven by substantial growth in personal loans, wealth, and insurance product offerings. The company has implemented an ‘efficiency’ strategy to streamline operations, resulting in a quarterly net income of $5.7 million, a significant improvement from a net loss in the previous quarter.

Key financial highlights include a 36% year-over-year increase in insurance revenues and a notable improvement in Adjusted EBITDA, which, despite remaining negative at $5.5 million, showed a significant quarter-over-quarter improvement. The company’s reorganization efforts also led to a reduction in operating costs and expenses. Geographic revenue performance varied, with notable growth in the Philippines and Hong Kong markets, countered by a decline in Singapore due to provider exits.

Strategically, MoneyHero focused on enhancing user experience and conversion rates, launching new membership features, and revamping its digital platforms. The company also completed the development of a Car Insurance vertical in Hong Kong, improving its competitive edge with real-time pricing capabilities. With a debt-free balance sheet and a strong cash position of $47.7 million, MoneyHero is poised for further growth.

Looking forward, MoneyHero’s management is optimistic about maintaining its growth trajectory, focusing on scaling high-margin products and improving Adjusted EBITDA. The company’s strategic initiatives and leaner cost structure are expected to support its ambitions for sustainable growth and long-term shareholder value.

data.title: Hepsiburada Reports Positive Q3 2024 Operating Income
data.description:
D-Market Electronic Services & Trading ( (HEPS) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information D-Market Electronic Services & Trading presented to its investors.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, doing business as Hepsiburada, is a prominent Turkish e-commerce platform that provides a wide range of products to consumers, with a focus on improving user experience and expanding payment solutions in the Turkish market.

In its third quarter of 2024, Hepsiburada reported a modest revenue increase of 1.7% to TRY 12.24 billion, despite the economic challenges posed by hyperinflation in Turkey. The company saw a significant improvement in its operating income, marking its first positive quarterly operating income since its IPO in July 2021, and a remarkable rise in EBITDA by 286.5% to TRY 507.8 million.

Key financial highlights include a 10.3% increase in gross merchandise value (GMV) to TRY 42.3 billion and a 18.9% rise in the number of orders, signaling robust consumer engagement. Although the company posted a net loss of TRY 307.4 million, Hepsiburada’s marketplace GMV share rose to 70.4%, reflecting a strategic shift towards third-party sales. Moreover, the company expanded its active customer base to 12.3 million and enhanced its delivery and financial services offerings.

Looking ahead, Hepsiburada aims to sustain growth by leveraging its strategic priorities like loyalty programs, superior delivery services, and innovative financial solutions. The anticipated acquisition by Kaspi.kz is expected to further bolster Hepsiburada’s capabilities and market reach, promising a synergistic expansion in Turkey and Kazakhstan.

Hepsiburada remains cautiously optimistic about future growth, projecting strong GMV growth and margin expansion in the upcoming quarter despite challenging macroeconomic conditions.
